creator: johan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

2.2 was a long time ago. Can you please try this in a newer release 
of FreeBSD (preferably 4.1-RELEASE) and report back if this works, 
by sending mail to 'freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org' with the 
subject of this mail. 

Thanks
